pageDescriptionWindows: Clear DNS cache, saved Wi-Fi profiles, and network history
pageDescriptionOther: Clear DNS cache and saved Wi-Fi profiles
emptyStateDescription: Discover network items that can be cleaned.
noItemsInCategory: No items found in this category
confirmDescription: This will clean {{count}} network item(s). DNS and ARP caches will rebuild automatically.
confirmWifiWarning: Warning: removing Wi-Fi profiles will delete saved passwords — you will need to re-enter them to reconnect.
confirmNetworkHistoryWarning: Network history entries will be permanently removed.
